title: Major Electronics Company
metaTitle: Major Electronics Company — AR Showroom · Artifact Digital
description: An immersive in-store AR showroom for a global electronics brand — QR-launched, app-free, and rich with real-time product context.

card.blurb: An in-store AR experience showcasing the company's Connected Home products.
card.imageAlt: Major Electronics Company in-store AR experience

lede: We partnered with a leading electronics brand to build an immersive AR showroom — bringing premium appliances to life through interactive in-store technology that drives engagement and informed purchases.

feature.caption: QR-launched AR running directly in the customer's browser — no app, no waiting.

pillarsHeading: Boost engagement. Ease entry. Sharpen discovery.

pillars.title: Boost engagement
pillars.body: A magnetic attractor loop pulled curious shoppers in and turned passive browsing into active exploration.

pillars.title: Easy entry
pillars.body: A single QR scan launched the experience straight on the customer's phone — no download, no friction.

pillars.title: Smart discovery
pillars.body: Object detection recognized appliances on the floor and surfaced features, 3D animations and lifestyle context in real time.

storyParagraphs: A QR-powered attractor loop opened the AR journey straight on the customer's phone — no app, no store account, no waiting. Object detection recognized each appliance on the floor and unlocked interactive overlays: feature highlights, 3D animations, and lifestyle context tuned to the product in front of them.

The roll-out covered select premium appliance stores, fully integrated with the brand's high-end aesthetic. Visually striking codes invited interaction, while intuitive, app-free navigation made access effortless — sparking curiosity and deeper engagement right at the point of decision.
storyCaption: Mobile-first overlays composed for in-store context.

highlights.title: App-free AR via QR
highlights.body: Zero install — scan to play, anywhere on the floor.

highlights.title: Real-time object detection
highlights.body: Recognizes appliances and triggers the right overlay.

highlights.title: 3D animations & lifestyle context
highlights.body: Feature reveals layered with how the product fits a home.

highlights.title: Premium store integration
highlights.body: A visual system tuned to the brand's high-end retail tone.

ctaHeading: Have a retail moment you want to reimagine?
